sites.name: Evident.icu — Launching Soon
sites.description: Evident.icu is currently undergoing final DNS configuration and will serve as the official domain for the Evident eDiscovery Suite. The platform is maintained and operated by Evident Technologies LLC. Activation is expected shortly following global DNS propagation.

sites.name: Tillerstead.com — Platform Upgrade in Progress
sites.description: Tillerstead is currently undergoing structured improvements and feature expansion. We are refining the estimating tools, contractor workflows, and project systems to deliver a stronger, more reliable platform. Updates will be released in phases as development progresses.
